zh.lifeSummary: 當Bird Land於1737年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素可時，他的父親Curtis Land III35歲，母親Priscilla K Bird21歲。他於1760年與Rebekah Lewellin在美國密西西比州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1794年11月在美國維吉尼亞州素坦普頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bird Land于1737年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素可时，他的父亲Curtis Land III35岁，母亲Priscilla K Bird21岁。他于1760年与Rebekah Lewellin在美国密西西比州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1794年11月在美国弗吉尼亚州素坦普頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Land
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: topographic name from Old English, Middle Dutch land, Middle High German lant ‘land, territory’. This had more specialized senses in the Middle Ages, being used to denote the countryside as opposed to a town or an estate.
English: topographic name from Middle English launde ‘glade’ (Old French land), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Launde in Leicestershire or Laund in Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads so named, from Old Norse land ‘land, territory’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lander
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic or status name from Middle High German lant, German Land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 1). Compare Landmann .
German: topographic name from Middle High German lander ‘picket fence’.
German: from the personal name Lanther, see Landherr 1.

variants.name: Lands
meanings: English: variant of   Land  .

variants.name: Landt
meanings: German: variant of   Land   1.

variants.name: Lande
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, so named from either the dative singular or the plural form of land (see Land 3).
German: from the old personal name Lando, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with lant ‘land’ (see Land ).

French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, moor, French lande (from Gaulish landa ‘space, land’), or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called La Lande from this word. Compare Lalande .

variants.name: Landfried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantel.
South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ (see Land ) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).

variants.name: Lawn
meanings: English:
variant of   Land   2.
from Middle English laun ‘lawn, fine linen’ (French laun, from the name of the city of Laon), perhaps for a maker or trader.

variants.name: Landa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Enrique, Jesus, Julio, Mario, Roberto, Miguel.

Basque: topographic name from landa ‘(large) field, prairie’. There is a place of this name in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain), and the surname may also be a habitational name from this place.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southwestern Norway, so named from the plural of land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 3).

variants.name: Lant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Land   with devoicing of the final consonant.

nameMeanings.name: Bird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern contracted form of   Brighid .

variants.name: Bride
meanings: Modern contracted form of   Brighid .

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

en.lifeSummary: When Bird Land was born in 1737, in Sussex, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Curtis Land III, was 35 and his mother, Priscilla K Bird, was 21. He married Rebekah Lewellin in 1760, in Mississippi, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about November 1794, in Southampton, Virginia, United States, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bird Land est né en 1737, à Sussex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Curtis Land III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Priscilla K Bird, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Rebekah Lewellin en 1760, à Mississippi, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ novembre 1794, à Southampton, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Lui sposato Rebekah Lewellin nel 1760, nel Mississippi, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Bird Landが1737年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スセックスで生まれた時，父Curtis Land IIIは35歳，母Priscilla K Birdは21歳であった。1760年にアメリカ合衆国ミシシッピ州でRebekah Lewellinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1794年11月にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ソウサンプトンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bird Land(이)가 1737년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Curtis Land III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Priscilla K Bird(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1760년 미국 미시시피 주에서 Rebekah Lewellin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1794년 11월 미국 버지니아 주 소우섬프턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bird Land nasceu em 1737, em Sussex, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Curtis Land III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Priscilla K Bird, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebekah Lewellin em 1760, em Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente novembro de 1794, em Southampton, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 57 anos.

ru.Albemarle, Sussex, Virginia, United Stat: альбемарл пэриш, суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bird Land родился в 1737 г. в местности суссекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Curtis Land III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Priscilla K Bird, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebekah Lewellin в 1760 г. в местности Миссисипи, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около ноябрь 1794 г. в местности соутамптон, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bird Land nació en 1737, en Sussex, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Curtis Land III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Priscilla K Bird, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rebekah Lewellin en 1760, en Misisipi, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente noviembre de 1794, en Southampton, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 57 años.
